title: Ubiquiti UA-G3-SK, UniFi G3 Starter Kit
category: Ubiquiti UA-G3-SK, UniFi G3 Starter Kit
description: The UniFi Access G3 Starter Kit is the third generation of the basic set of components to install the UniFi Access access system . The set is compatible with most electric locks, magnetic locks and a whole range of 12V accessories such as motion sensors, buttons and alarms. The installation of the entire ecosystem is very fast, easy and offers simple management of users , visitors, plans and levels or access permissions via UniFi Access Controller.
